creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
On Sat, Jun 30, 2001 at 02:08:19PM -0500, mikea@mikea.ath.cx wrote:
> >Environment:
> FreeBSD 4.3; most recent cvsup 22Jun2001, 14:22 CDT
> System: FreeBSD mikea.ath.cx 4.3-STABLE FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE #11: Fri Jun 15 21:49:00 CDT 2001 root@mikea.ath.cx:/usr/src/sys/compile/MPFW7 i386

[snip]

> Kernel compiled before yesterday's cvsup works fine. Recompiled
> and reinstalled new kernel to see if the fault was repeatable.
> It is: the new kernel fails with the same symptoms.

Just to check - is 22 June the last cvsup which produced a working
kernel or the first cvsup which failed to produce a working kernel?
Do you have the date from the previous kernel?

(I can't see anything obvious in the commit logs near the 22 June...)

	David.
